title: Teladoc Health Q2 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Teladoc Health Q2 2024 Earnings Call Summary. Financial Results - Consolidated Performance: Q2 revenue $642 million (down 2% YoY), Adjusted EBITDA $89.5 million (up 24% YoY, 13.9% margin), Net loss per share $4.92 (included $4.64 goodwill impairment), Free cash flow $60.9 million. Segment Results - Integrated Care: Revenue $377 million (up 5% YoY), Adjusted EBITDA $64 million (69% increase YoY), U.S. members 92.4 million (up 8% YoY, +600K sequentially), Chronic care enrollment 1.17 million (up 9% YoY). BetterHelp: Revenue $265 million (down 9% YoY), Adjusted EBITDA $25 million (down 26% YoY), Serving over 1 million unique individuals annually, Net Promoter Score 70+. Key Issues: Management highlighted elevated customer acquisition costs in BetterHelp's advertising channels, particularly double-digit increases in May-June 2024. CEO Chuck Divita noted the business faces operating challenges requiring strategic pivots toward insurance coverage and international expansion. 2024 Guidance Updates: Integrated Care low to mid-single digit revenue growth with 150-200 basis points EBITDA margin expansion. BetterHelp withdrawing full year guidance due to limited visibility on CAC trends.
